idea-plugin.name: Large File Compare
idea-plugin.description: Sort and compare very large text files (200k–2M lines) such as SQL exports, CSV dumps, and structured config/property files side by side. Renders in seconds with smooth scrolling — compare as-is, by sort order, or by key column (match rows by a unique ID field).

action.text: Large File Compare: Compare Two Files
action.description: Sort and compare two large text files side by side
